title: Bauer 38889 Hot Air Blow Dry Brush/Round Hair Dryer Brush for Short to Medium Hair/Ionic Oval Volumiser Styling Tool / 1000W
features: BLOW DRY STYLER – Cut down on hair styling time with this blow dry brush that combines the power of an electric hair dryer with the styling ability of a salon brush. With an easy to grip brush handle, achieve beautiful hair every day without having to visit the salon.

LARGE BRUSH HEAD – The styler has a large, oval brush head to dry hair quickly while creating volume, bounce, and curly ends. Long bristles with comfortable ball tips work to detangle hair, while the brush’s shorter bristles help to smooth hair.

3 HEAT SETTINGS – This blow dry brush features 3 separate heat settings, high, low, or cool to set your style. Select your preferred heat setting depending on your hair type and desired result. Ideal for use on short to medium hair, the brush gives you full control of how you want your hair to look, and can also be used to create a smooth, straight finish if desired.

IONIC TECHNOLOGY – Ionic technology helps to lock in moisture, reducing frizz and static while boosting shine. 360° airflow vents distribute the heat evenly and the long 1.8m power cord has a tangle-free swivel function for easier styling.

BAUER PROFESSIONAL – Bauer Professional is the leading manufacturer of salon quality hair products, as well as beauty and personal care products for both men and women. Browse the whole range at the Bauer Professional page on Amazon today.
description: Product Description 2 Sizes Available Ionic Blow Dry Brush Achieve beautiful hair and cut down on hair styling time with these blow-dry brushes that combine the power of an electric hair dryer with the styling ability of a salon brush. Each styler has a large, oval brush head to dry hair quickly while creating volume, bounce, and curly ends. Long bristles with comfortable ball tips work to detangle hair, while the brush’s shorter bristles help to smooth hair. The styler comes in 2 sizes - regular for medium to long hair & mini for short to medium hair. Previous page Large Brush Head Creates volume and bouncy curls. Long bristles detangle hair while short bristles smooth hair. Ionic Technology Helps to lock in moisture, reducing frizz & static while boosting shine. 3 Heat Settings Set your preferred heat level. Choose the high, low, or cool setting to set your style. Easy Grip Handle Gives you full control of your styling. 360° Swivel Cord The styler features a 2.5m power cord with a tangle-free swivel function and hanging hook.
